visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a plaid flat cap is positioned centrally in a medium close-up, speaking directly to the lens against a neutral gray studio background. His facial expressions are animated, with frequent mouth movements and expressive eyebrows as he discusses technology trends. (2) The scene transitions briefly to a retail environment showing various smartphones like vivo and OPPO arranged on a clear acrylic display stand with vibrant price tags and promotional cards. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the sleek textures of the device screens and bodies. (3) Returning to the studio, the man continues his narration while various graphic overlays appear, including small portrait photos of tech executives like Tim Cook, Satya Nadella, and Jensen Huang. These overlays are accompanied by large, bold traditional Chinese text describing their AI usage habits, set against the same plain background. (4) The video concludes with the man gesturing towards the camera with his hands, encouraging viewer interaction. He maintains a friendly smile, and a large call-to-action text prompt appears at the bottom of the screen, while the brand logo remains visible in the top corner.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko 米可手機館. [Subtitle]: 2025年科技圈. (2) [Slogan]: 推薦大家買手機到米可. [Subtitle]: 就連大家生活中也慢慢習慣使用AI. (3) [Variety]: 科技圈大佬如何運用AI?. (4) [Subtitle]: 首先蘋果執行長庫克. [Subtitle]: Apple Intelligence的到來. (5) [Subtitle]: 快速地掌握重點省去了大量的時間逐一閱讀. (6) [Subtitle]: 而微軟執行長納德拉則說. (7) [Subtitle]: 因為他都利用微軟的Copilot將Podcast內容轉錄為文字. (8) [Subtitle]: 十個客製化的AI代理人. (9) [Subtitle]: 輝達執行長黃仁勳則表示. (10) [Subtitle]: 留言告訴我你都怎麼使用AI.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in studio, 3 small static photos of tech executives (Tim Cook, Satya Nadella, Jensen Huang) used as overlays.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged male with short hair, wearing a grey plaid flat cap, black-rimmed glasses, and a tan/grey long-sleeved shirt with a 'Roots' logo visible on the chest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a clean, minimalist grey studio wall. A secondary scene shows the interior of a 'miko' mobile phone retail store with illuminated display racks and branded signage.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male vocal track delivering rapid Mandarin speech with clear articulation. The voice is paired with an upbeat, moderate-tempo electronic BGM featuring synth pads and a steady percussive beat that maintains a positive and informative mood. (2) A subtle 'pop' sound effect triggers as a new text graphic is referenced, following the rhythm of the speech. The music remains consistent in the background, providing a professional and engaging bed for the narration as the speaker shifts focus to different tech CEOs. (3) The vocal intensity remains high with rising intonations used to emphasize key points about AI productivity. Frequent digital SFX accompany the visual cuts, adding a sense of modern technological flair. The overall mix is clean with an excellent signal-to-noise ratio, typical of a professional studio recording. (4) In the final phase, the speaker's tone becomes more invitational, concluding with a call for comments. The music swells slightly in the closing seconds, ending with a clean finish alongside the speaker's final sentence, maintaining a bright and optimistic spectral quality throughout.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Industry Examples -> Endorsement -> Engagement
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform viewers about the practical AI applications used by top tech executives (Cook, Nadella, Huang) to highlight the utility of AI in 2025. It serves a secondary promotional purpose for 'miko 米可手機館', a mobile retail chain, by encouraging viewers to purchase smartphones there to experience these AI capabilities.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker explicitly mentions '推薦大家買手機到米可' (Recommend everyone to buy phones at miko) and visual logos/store interiors are prominently displayed.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-information density approach common in Taiwanese tech social media, blending industry commentary with commercial promotion through fast-paced editing and vibrant overlays.
